style_name: Folded Diamond Perspective Type Poster Style
style_summary: A bold minimalist editorial poster style using low-angle hero photography inside a diamond aperture, folded tan paper or canvas planes, and oversized white perspective typography printed across the lower surface.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main person, athlete, dancer, model, musician, founder, maker, or product hero
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: standing over the camera, stepping forward, crouching above the viewer, reaching downward, jumping, holding a prop, or looking down with confidence
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: shoe, skateboard, basketball, camera, bag, bottle, instrument, notebook, tool, or featured product
environment_variables.LOCATION: open sky, rooftop, court, desert road, studio courtyard, skate spot, beach, or clean outdoor setting
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: folded tan paper, cardboard, linen canvas, central crease, shadowed hinge, diamond aperture, subtle grain
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: huge bold headline in white condensed type
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: tiny clean editorial metadata or short supporting phrase
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: thin vertical separator, small slash, tiny dot, minimal rule, or small geometric marker
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: monochrome streetwear, white denim, oversized shirt, athletic layers, minimal sneakers, or tonal editorial styling

prompt_template:
Create an image in folded-diamond-perspective-type-poster-style.

Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, interacting with {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, in {LOCATION}. Use {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Shoot the subject as a real-photo low-angle hero image with wide-lens foreshortening, strong sunlight, and a bright cyan sky or clean outdoor backdrop.

Layout: place the photo inside a large rotated square diamond aperture in the upper half of a tactile folded tan paper or linen canvas surface. Include {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Create a deep central fold or crease running down from the diamond point into the lower poster.

Typography: set the main headline "{MAIN_TEXT}" in enormous white ultra-bold condensed sans-serif type across the lower half. Make the type feel printed onto the folded surface, split by the central crease, distorted by perspective, cropped by the poster edges, and lightly textured by the paper grain. Add "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" only as tiny clean editorial microcopy using {ACCENT_SYMBOL}.

Mood and finish: bold minimalism, streetwear editorial, monumental confidence, warm tan cardstock texture, crisp sunlight, cyan sky contrast, soft shadows, printed-paper grain, sharp geometric photo crop. Avoid watermarks, usernames, QR codes, creator IDs, platform logos, and app marks.
negative_prompt: busy collage, many photos, eye-level portrait, small headline, thin serif typography, playful rounded type, glossy 3D letters, neon gradients, corporate brochure, clean vector-only design, flat background with no paper grain, crowded secondary text, watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, app interface marks

values.SUBJECT: a young basketball player
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: stepping over the camera while holding a ball low
values.LOCATION: an outdoor court under clear sky
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: folded tan canvas paper, a diamond aperture, a central crease, warm shadows, and subtle woven grain
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: white mesh jersey, cream track pants, and minimal high-top sneakers

values.SUBJECT: a street skater
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: crouching above the viewer with one shoe close to the lens
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: rough tan cardstock, folded planes, diamond photo crop, central crease, printed grain, and soft edge shadow
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: oversized white tee, washed denim, and dark skate shoes

values.SUBJECT: a young photographer
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: leaning over the camera and pointing a compact camera downward
values.LOCATION: a clean rooftop with open blue sky
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: beige linen texture, strong center fold, shadowed hinge, diamond window, and fine paper grain
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: white overshirt, loose ivory trousers, and a simple black strap

values.SUBJECT: an outdoor runner
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: stepping forward above the camera with one sole exaggerated in foreground
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a trail shoe and water bottle
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: folded kraft paper, canvas grain, central crease, diamond aperture, warm edge shadow, and printed texture
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: white windbreaker, beige running shorts, and cream trail shoes
